value.title: Amazon (AMZN) Commits $13 Billion To India As AWS Faces EU Gatekeeper Status
value.summary: Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN) has announced a planned US$13b investment to expand its AI, cloud, and logistics infrastructure in India. The investment targets new data centers, AI capacity, and delivery capabilities to support growing demand from businesses and consumers in the country. In Europe, the European Commission has preliminarily designated Amazon Web Services (AWS) as a gatekeeper under the Digital Markets Act. The gatekeeper status could subject AWS to additional rules on data...

value.title: Ryan Cohen-led GameStop pledges to pursue its takeover offer for eBay
value.summary: GameStop pledged on Friday to pursue its proposed ‌takeover of eBay, even after ‌the e-commerce firm rejected an unsolicited cash-and-stock offer ​of about $56 billion from the videogame retailer.  GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen had surprised Wall Street with the offer to ‌buy eBay ⁠in May to turn it into a bigger competitor to ⁠Amazon.  GameStop also expects to generate adjusted earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation ​and amortization ​of more than $600 ​million in fiscal ‌2026, compared with $345.4 million reported in fiscal 2025, it said in a regulatory filing.
